title: Ennamo Yeadho Edho lyrics Ko Song Lyrics
singerName: Aalap Raju, Emcee Jazz, Prashanthini, Sricharan
stanzas:
Song: Ennamo Yeadho
Singer: Aalaap Raju, Prashanthini, Rap Sricharan, Emcee Jesz
Lyrics: Sricharan, Emcee Jesz, Karky

Yeah.. Say what...
Ennamo edho,Ennam thiraluthu kanavil
vannam thiraluthu ninaivil, Kangal iruludhu nanavil
Ennamo edho, mutti mulaikkudhu manadhil
Vetti erindhidum nodiyil,Mottu avizhuthu kodiyil

Eno kuviyamilla kuviyamilla oru katchi pedai..
oh ohh..uruvamilla uruvamilla naalai,
Eno kuviyamilla kuviyamilla oru katchi pedai..
oh ohh.. araimanadhaai vidiyithu en kaalai.

Ennamo edho, minnimarayidhu vizhiyil
andhi agaludhu vazhiyil, sindhi sidharudhu veliyil..
Ennamo edho,sikki thavikkudhu manadhil
rekkai virikkudhu kanavil, Vittu parakkudhu thozhaivil

Eno kuviyamilla kuviyamilla ... (repeated as above)
Neeyum naanum endhirama, yaaro seiyum mandhirama, poove..

Muthamitta moochu kaatril, pattu pattu kettu ponen,
pakkam vanthu irkum podhu, thittamittu etti ponen..
Nerungadhe penne endhan nenjellam nanjaagum,
azhaikadhe penne endhan achangal achagum.
Sirippaal ennai nee sidhaithaai podhum…

(starting lines repeated)
Aedho .... Enamo aedho… ..Mottu avizhuthu kodiyil..
Neeyum naanum endhirama, yaaro seiyum mandhirama, poove

Let’s go.. wow.. wow..ungalin thamizhachi..
enamo edho you’re looking too black, 
marakka mudiyalaye en manam andru..
 Un manaso lovely, ippadiye ippo un arugil vanthu seravaa indru.
 
[lady looking like a cindrella cindrella, naughty look-u vita thendral-a..
lady looking like a cindrella cindrella, ennai vattam idum vennila..] (2)

suthi suthi unnai thedi, vizhigal alayum avasaam eno..
satha satha nerisalil un sol satham ariyum adhisayam eno..
Kanakaana thaane penne kan kondhe vantheno…
vina kaana vidayum kaana kanneerum kondeno
nizhalai thirudum mazhalai naano.....!!

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song conveys a sense of excitement and curiosity about love and relationships, capturing the playful essence of youth.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Ko, this song reflects the carefree and energetic moments of the characters, enhancing the film's vibrant narrative.

Who are the singers and music director of the song?

The song features vocals by Aalap Raju, Emcee Jazz, Prashanthini, and Sricharan, with music composed by Harrish Jeyaraj.

When was the song released?

The song was released on January 21, 2011.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Ennamo Yeadho Edho from the movie Ko is an energetic dance number that encapsulates the thrill of youthful love and excitement. With its catchy beats and lively lyrics, it invites listeners to embrace the joy of celebration. The collaboration of multiple talented singers adds a dynamic flair, making it a perfect anthem for parties and gatherings. Overall, the song evokes feelings of happiness and enthusiasm, resonating well with the vibrant spirit of the film.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Ennamo Yeadho Edho from Ko is a vibrant track that perfectly captures the essence of youthful exuberance. With a unique collaboration of Aalap Raju's melodious voice and Emcee Jazz's rap, this song is sure to get you on your feet. The infectious beats crafted by Harrish Jeyaraj elevate the overall vibe, making it a must-listen for party enthusiasts.
stanzaMeanings: Something is happening, something is stirring in dreams and thoughts, my eyes are darkened, something is happening, my heart is blooming with joy, at the moment of realization, the flower is falling down.

There is no form, no shape, just a gathering of people... oh ohh... there is no form, no shape, tomorrow, there is no form, no shape, just a gathering of people... oh ohh... the dawn of a new day is breaking.
Something is happening, the light is shining in my eyes, the path is dark, something is happening, my heart is fluttering with dreams, it is flying away in the air.
There is no form, no shape... (repeated as above) You and I are together, who is casting a spell, oh flower...

In the breeze of a kiss, I am singing softly, when you come near, I am getting excited... Don't be afraid, my dear, my heart will be true, don't cry, my dear, my feelings will be pure. With a smile, you have captured me...
(starting lines repeated) Something... something is happening... the flower is falling down... You and I are together, who is casting a spell, oh flower.

Let’s go.. wow.. wow.. your Tamil girl.. something is happening, you’re looking too dark, my heart cannot forget... Your mind is lovely, just like that, coming close to you today. [lady looking like a Cinderella, with a naughty look... lady looking like a Cinderella, my circle is around the moon...]

Searching around for you, my eyes are filled with longing... in the midst of a hundred moments, your voice is a wonder... I have come with a golden heart, will I see the music, will I see the tears, I am the shadow that steals away...!!
